app.title: रिज्यूमे संपादक
app.description: Visual resume editor based on JSON Resume Schema with XSLT template rendering

messages.schemaLoadError: Failed to load schema.json from both external and local sources. The editor may not work properly.
messages.invalidDataURL: Invalid data parameter: Unable to decode JSON data from URL.
messages.urlLoadError: Failed to load resume from URL
messages.featureError: Some features may not work properly. Please refresh the page.
messages.tip: Tip: For large JSON files, use the ?url= parameter instead

label.label: लेबल
label.description: Professional title or role, such as 'Senior Software Engineer' or 'Product Designer'

email.label: ईमेल
email.description: Primary email address for professional contact

phone.label: फोन
phone.description: Contact telephone number in any preferred format

summary.label: सारांश
summary.description: Brief professional summary highlighting key experience and expertise

image.label: छवि
image.description: Web address pointing to a profile photograph in JPEG or PNG format

address.label: पता
address.description: Street address with multiple lines separated by newline characters

region.label: क्षेत्र
region.description: State, county, province, or region within the country

countryCode.label: देश कोड
countryCode.description: Two-letter country code following ISO-3166-1 ALPHA-2 standard (GB, US, FR, etc.)

title.label: शीर्षक
title.description: Job title or professional title of the person

age.label: आयु
age.description: Age of the person in years

dateOfBirth.label: Dateofbirth
dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth in ISO 8601 format

coreCompetencies.label: Corecompetencies
coreCompetencies.description: Core professional competencies and areas of expertise

profiles.label: प्रोफाइल
profiles.description: List of social media and professional network profiles

network.label: नेटवर्क
network.description: Name of the social network or platform (LinkedIn, GitHub, Twitter, etc.)

username.label: उपयोगकर्ता नाम
username.description: Username or handle on the platform

url.label: Url
url.description: Direct link to the profile page

country.label: देश
country.description: Country of citizenship using ISO-3166-1 ALPHA-2 code (GB, US, FR, etc.)

born.label: Born
born.description: Whether this is the country of birth

workAuthorization.label: Workauthorization
workAuthorization.description: Work authorization information for multiple countries

country.label: देश
country.description: Country code using ISO-3166-1 ALPHA-2 standard (e.g., GB, US, FR)

status.label: स्थिति
status.description: Work authorization status (e.g., 'Citizen', 'Permanent Resident', 'Work Visa', 'No Authorization')

rightToWork.label: Righttowork
rightToWork.description: Whether person has unrestricted right to work in this country

visaType.label: Visatype
visaType.description: Type or category of visa if applicable (e.g., 'H-1B', 'Skilled Worker', 'Temporary', 'Permanent Residence')

validFrom.label: Validfrom
validFrom.description: Start date of work authorization or visa validity

validTo.label: Validto
validTo.description: Expiration date of work authorization or visa (omit if permanent)

notes.label: Notes
notes.description: Additional notes or restrictions on work authorization

text.label: पाठ
text.description: The legal statement or consent text

country.label: देश
country.description: Country code for which this legal note applies

type.label: प्रकार
type.description: Type of legal note (e.g., gdpr_consent, disclaimer)

url.label: URL
url.description: Link to full privacy policy or legal information

position.label: पद
position.description: Job title or role held at the organisation

endDate.label: समाप्ति तिथि
endDate.description: Date when employment ended (omit if currently employed)

summary.label: सारांश
summary.description: Overview of responsibilities and role within the organisation

highlights.label: मुख्य बातें
highlights.description: Notable achievements and accomplishments in this role

address.label: पता
address.description: Street address with multiple lines separated by newline characters (\n)

region.label: क्षेत्र
region.description: State, county, province, or region within the country

countryCode.label: Countrycode
countryCode.description: Two-letter country code following ISO-3166-1 ALPHA-2 standard (GB, US, FR, etc.)

country.label: देश
country.description: Full country name (optional, countryCode is preferred)

industry.label: उद्योग
industry.description: Industry sector or business domain of the organization (e.g., 'Financial Technology', 'Healthcare', 'E-commerce', 'Manufacturing')

workLocation.label: Worklocation
workLocation.description: Geographic location of the workplace (legacy field, use 'location' object for structured data)

description.label: विवरण
description.description: Brief description of the company or its industry

workType.label: Worktype
workType.description: Type of work arrangement (remote, hybrid, onsite, full-time, part-time, contract, freelance, internship, temporary)

organization.label: Organisation
organization.description: Name of the charitable organisation or community group

position.label: पद
position.description: Role or title held within the organisation

endDate.label: समाप्ति तिथि
endDate.description: Date when volunteer work ended (omit if ongoing)

summary.label: सारांश
summary.description: Description of volunteer responsibilities and contributions

highlights.label: मुख्य बातें
highlights.description: Key accomplishments and impact made through volunteer work

institution.label: संस्थान
institution.description: Name of the educational institution or university

area.label: क्षेत्र
area.description: Field of study or academic discipline

studyType.label: अध्ययन प्रकार
studyType.description: Type of qualification (Bachelor, Master, PhD, etc.)

endDate.label: समाप्ति तिथि
endDate.description: Date when studies concluded or expected completion date

score.label: अंक
score.description: Final grade, GPA, or classification achieved

courses.label: पाठ्यक्रम
courses.description: Relevant modules, courses, or subjects studied

school.label: विद्यालय
school.description: Name of the educational institution or university (alias for institution)

degree.label: डिग्री
degree.description: Type of degree or qualification obtained (alias for studyType)

description.label: विवरण
description.description: Additional details about the educational experience, achievements, or focus areas

gpa.label: GPA
gpa.description: Grade Point Average or equivalent scoring (alias for score)

location.label: स्थान
location.description: Geographic location of the educational institution (city, state/region)

country.label: देश
country.description: Country where the institution is located, preferably using ISO-3166-1 ALPHA-2 code

title.label: शीर्षक
title.description: Name or title of the award

awarder.label: पुरस्कार देने वाला
awarder.description: Organisation or entity that presented the award

summary.label: सारांश
summary.description: Reason for receiving the award or context

url.label: URL
url.description: Link to certificate verification or details

publisher.label: प्रकाशक
publisher.description: Name of the publisher or journal

summary.label: सारांश
summary.description: Brief abstract or description of the publication content

keywords.label: मुख्य शब्द
keywords.description: Specific technologies, tools, or techniques within this skill area

yearsOfExperience.label: Yearsofexperience
yearsOfExperience.description: Number of years of practical experience with this skill

comment.label: टिप्पणी
comment.description: Additional context or notes about this skill

name.label: नाम
name.description: Name of the tool or software

level.label: स्तर
level.description: Proficiency level with this tool (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced, Expert)

yearsOfExperience.label: Years of Experience
yearsOfExperience.description: Number of years using this tool professionally

group.label: समूह
group.description: Category or group for organizing related tools (e.g., 'Monitoring & Logging', 'Web & Servers')

category.label: श्रेणी
category.description: Category or group for organizing related tools (alias for group)

comment.label: टिप्पणी
comment.description: Additional details about usage, proficiency, or context

url.label: Url
url.description: Link to the tool's website or documentation

fluency.label: प्रवाह
fluency.description: Level of proficiency (Native, Fluent, Intermediate, Basic)

keywords.label: मुख्य शब्द
keywords.description: Specific topics or activities within this interest

name.label: नाम
name.description: Name of the person providing the reference

reference.label: संदर्भ
reference.description: The reference statement or testimonial text

description.label: विवरण
description.description: Brief overview of what the project entailed

highlights.label: मुख्य बातें
highlights.description: Key features, achievements, or outcomes of the project

keywords.label: मुख्य शब्द
keywords.description: Technologies, methodologies, or tools used in the project

endDate.label: समाप्ति तिथि
endDate.description: Date when project was completed (omit if ongoing)

url.label: URL
url.description: Link to project repository, demo, or documentation

roles.label: भूमिकाएं
roles.description: Roles held or responsibilities taken in the project

entity.label: इकाई
entity.description: Organization or company the project was associated with

type.label: प्रकार
type.description: Category of project (application, volunteering, presentation, conference, etc.)

canonical.label: Canonical
canonical.description: Permanent URL where the latest version of this resume can be found

version.label: Version
version.description: Version number following semantic versioning format

lastModified.label: Lastmodified
lastModified.description: Timestamp of last modification in ISO 8601 format

dateCreated.label: Datecreated
dateCreated.description: Timestamp when the document was created in ISO 8601 format

dateModified.label: Datemodified
dateModified.description: Timestamp when the document was last modified in ISO 8601 format

datePublished.label: Datepublished
datePublished.description: Timestamp when the document was published in ISO 8601 format
